channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-14630] sanity test_42e: failed grant check
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for S Buisson <sbuisson@ddn.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/40d4a200-7baa-4207-832d-13014cf240dd

test_42e failed with the following error:

failed grant check: client:330260480 server:0

CMD: trevis-10vm5.trevis.whamcloud.com,trevis-10vm6 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param osc.lustre-*.cur_*_bytes
osc.lustre-OST0000-osc-ffff9567485ff800.cur_dirty_bytes=0
osc.lustre-OST0000-osc-ffff9567485ff800.cur_dirty_grant_bytes=0
osc.lustre-OST0000-osc-ffff9567485ff800.cur_lost_grant_bytes=0
osc.lustre-OST0001-osc-ffff9567485ff800.cur_dirty_bytes=0
osc.lustre-OST0001-osc-ffff9567485ff800.cur_dirty_grant_bytes=0

osc.lustre-OST0002-osc-ffff9567485ff800.cur_dirty_bytes=0
osc.lustre-OST0002-osc-ffff9567485ff800.cur_dirty_grant_bytes=0

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
sanity test_42e - failed grant check: client:330260480 server:0

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: Duplicate of LU-11596.
Duplicate of LU-11596.
